value.Title: Bearing Lubrication Jet Orifice Correction
value.Description: Corrects drawing error that resulted in undersized lubrication jet orifice (0.5mm actual vs 0.9mm design) on ENG-BEARING-005. Root cause analysis documented in DOC-FAIL-REPORT-004. This is a mandatory safety action.
value.Reason: Premature bearing failure at 4,200 hours during accelerated life testing traced to lubricant starvation from undersized oil jet orifice on main shaft bearing.

AffectedParts.Disposition: Rework oil jet orifice to 0.9mm diameter per revised drawing

value.Title: FADEC Software Update - Improved EGT Limiting Algorithm
value.Description: Updates FADEC software to version 3.2.1 with improved exhaust gas temperature (EGT) limiting algorithm. New algorithm reduces EGT exceedances by 40% compared to previous version through predictive limiting logic.
value.Reason: Customer feedback and flight data analysis indicates EGT limiting algorithm causes unnecessary power reductions during high-altitude cruise. New predictive algorithm improves fuel efficiency by 0.3% while maintaining safety margins.

AffectedParts.Disposition: Update software to v3.2.1. Load via ACARS maintenance data link.

AffectedDocuments.Action: Update REQ-LIM-003 to reflect improved hysteresis values

value.Title: Combustion Chamber Liner Material Upgrade
value.Description: Upgrades combustion chamber liner material from Nimonic 263 to CM247LC directionally solidified alloy for improved high-temperature oxidation resistance. Expected to extend time on wing from 12,000 to 18,000 hours.
value.Reason: Borescope inspections show oxidation cracking on combustion liner at 10,000-12,000 hours service life. New CM247LC material provides superior oxidation resistance at temperatures above 1,100°C. Will reduce maintenance costs and improve aircraft dispatch reliability.

AffectedParts.Disposition: New production parts use CM247LC. Existing parts maintain current material until retirement.

AffectedDocuments.Action: Update section 4.1 to add CM247LC to approved hot section materials list
Create new material certification for CM247LC
